---
title: "Getting Started"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Getting Started}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
```

`NestedWGCNA` is a minimal two-stage co-expression package.
This page shows the shortest end-to-end run using simulated data only.

```{r}
library(NestedWGCNA)
set.seed(100)
x <- matrix(rnorm(60 * 500), nrow = 60, ncol = 500)
rownames(x) <- paste0("S", seq_len(nrow(x)))
colnames(x) <- paste0("G", seq_len(ncol(x)))

res <- run_nested_wgcna(
  x = x,
  mode = "paper",
  min_cgm_size = 50,
  min_fgm_size = 20,
  top_n_genes = 300
)

summary(res)
head(res$fgm$assignment)
```

Interpretation:

- CGM represents broad structure from top variable genes.
- Core-based normalization recenters expression by module baselines.
- FGM adds finer decomposition after normalization.
